rag_rules: Repair AGREE annex syntax errors by correcting mismatched characters and ensuring proper termination of annex blocks
Resolve 'sourceText' requirement by providing valid annex content with correct bracketing and syntax
generic_rules: AGREE annexes must contain well-formed expressions with properly typed identifiers
Fix validation errors by addressing the first unresolved reference before modifying other clauses
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are closed with '};' and contain no extraneous whitespace in expressions
Use only AADL-visible features or locally declared helpers in guarantee expressions
anti_patterns: Do not insert new components or connections to fix AGREE syntax errors
Avoid modifying AADL structure when the error is confined to annex text content
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
